user_feedback: the text fields are still offsett tot eh left, can you move all the hud elements a bit more to the right
analysis:
- Issue identified: HUD text elements (Qualified, Level, Score) are positioned at x=50, which appears too far left. The user wants all HUD elements moved more to the right.
- Files affected: ui.js (only file that needs changes)
- Changes needed: Increase the x-coordinate values for the left-aligned HUD text elements in the drawHUD() function. Move from x=50 to x=100 for better right-side positioning with more padding from the left edge.
